judgment.summary: Strong earnings growth and robust free cash flow are offset by a high trailing P/E, though the forward P/E suggests significant future earnings expansion.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 6.4%; next earnings date is 2026-05-21.
positives: Quarterly earnings growth 54.3% YoY — indicates strong recent performance.
Free cash flow (TTM) $3.01B — substantial cash generation.
Forward P/E 9.79x — significantly lower than trailing P/E, implying high expected earnings growth.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $178.16.
Gross margin 75.7% — healthy for a software company.
negatives: Trailing P/E 46.87x — valuation appears high based on past performance.
Operating margin 12.0% and Profit margin 7.3% — could be higher given revenue.
Debt/Equity 48.96% — leverage is present but not excessive.
Return on equity 8.2% and Return on assets 3.6% — could be improved.

news.paragraph: Workday released its fiscal Q1 earnings, with analysts closely examining its earnings growth dynamics. The company's performance in the latest quarter is under scrutiny following the earnings announcement. Investors will be looking for commentary on future growth drivers and any updated guidance.

headlines.title: Analyzing Workday’s (WDAY) Idiosyncratic Earnings Growth Dynamics
